questions.question: Define a cuboid.
questions.answer: A cuboid is a solid bounded by six rectangular faces.

questions.question: Define a cube.
questions.answer: A cube is a cuboid in which all edges are equal.

questions.question: Write the formula for curved surface area of a cylinder.
questions.answer: The curved surface area of a cylinder is 2πrh.

questions.question: Write the formula for total surface area of a cube.
questions.answer: The total surface area of a cube is 6a².

questions.question: Define a hemisphere.
questions.answer: A hemisphere is half of a sphere.

questions.question: Write the formula for volume of a cuboid.
questions.answer: The volume of a cuboid is l × b × h.

questions.question: Write the formula for volume of a cube.
questions.answer: The volume of a cube is a³.

questions.question: What is meant by curved surface area?
questions.answer: Curved surface area is the area of only the curved part of a solid.

questions.question: Write the formula for curved surface area of a cone.
questions.answer: The curved surface area of a cone is πrl.

questions.question: What is the base shape of a cylinder?
questions.answer: The base of a cylinder is circular.

questions.question: Write the formula for volume of a cylinder.
questions.answer: The volume of a cylinder is πr²h.

questions.question: Define slant height of a cone.
questions.answer: Slant height is the distance from the vertex of the cone to any point on the circumference of the base.

questions.question: Write the formula for curved surface area of a hemisphere.
questions.answer: The curved surface area of a hemisphere is 2πr².

questions.question: Write the formula for volume of a cone.
questions.answer: The volume of a cone is (1/3)πr²h.

questions.question: What is meant by total surface area?
questions.answer: Total surface area is the sum of the areas of all the faces of a solid.

questions.question: Write the formula for volume of a hemisphere.
questions.answer: The volume of a hemisphere is (2/3)πr³.

questions.question: State the approximate value of π.
questions.answer: The approximate value of π is 3.14 or 22/7.

questions.question: What is the unit of surface area?
questions.answer: The unit of surface area is square units like cm² or m².

questions.question: What is the unit of volume?
questions.answer: The unit of volume is cubic units like cm³ or m³.

questions.question: How many faces does a cube have?
questions.answer: A cube has six faces.

questions.question: What is the shape of the base of a cone?
questions.answer: The base of a cone is circular.

questions.question: What is the diameter of a sphere?
questions.answer: The diameter of a sphere is twice its radius.

questions.question: What is capacity?
questions.answer: Capacity is the amount of liquid a container can hold.

questions.question: What is the shape of a medicine capsule?
questions.answer: A medicine capsule is a cylinder with two hemispherical ends.

questions.question: What is the shape of a water tank generally?
questions.answer: Water tanks are generally cylindrical in shape.
